# Interface: RequestedClaims

Optional claims for fine-grained Unity Catalog table permissions When specified, the returned token will be scoped to only the requested tables

## Properties[​](#properties "Direct link to Properties")

### permission\_set?[​](#permission_set "Direct link to permission_set?")

```ts
optional permission_set: READ_ONLY;

```

Permission level to request

***

### resources?[​](#resources "Direct link to resources?")

```ts
optional resources: RequestedResource[];

```

List of UC resources to request access to
